storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — validate, prompt-build, and LLM synthesis run in both modes. In cloud mode: (1) AJV schema validation is skipped (replaced by inline enum/structure checks in Node 5), (2) artifact write (competitor-clusters.json) is skipped, (3) competitor_clusters returned inline. Inline validation (enum + required fields + minItems) always runs.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1 (after build-brand-positioning). Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config, store_profile, market_intelligence, brand_positioning, normalized_intake_payload }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_name, artifact_path, competitor_clusters, cluster_count, mode, runtime_config, status, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings, notes, envelope }

operatingModes.url-seeded: >=2 competitor_urls in intake — LLM groups provided URLs into 2–4 clusters. No invented URLs allowed.
operatingModes.hybrid: Exactly 1 competitor_url — 1 URL-seeded cluster + 1–2 archetype clusters for remaining landscape.
operatingModes.archetype: 0 competitor_urls — 2–3 pure archetype clusters using ARCHETYPE-PLACEHOLDER.

storeOs.evidenceBoundary: No live competitor crawling, no external competitive intelligence APIs. All strengths, weaknesses, patterns, and opportunities are LLM inference. competitor_urls from intake are used as naming/labeling hints only. Cluster outputs are planning hypotheses requiring human review.
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in 'LLM Synthesis: Competitor Clusters' with your n8n OpenAI credential ID.
Self-hosted: ensure STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH points to the schemas/ directory containing competitor-cluster.schema.json and ajv@8 is installed in n8n node_modules.
Cloud mode: OpenAI credential must be configured in n8n. competitor_clusters is returned inline — no disk write.
cloudSkipped: AJV schema validation — no local schema files in n8n Cloud (replaced by inline enum/structure checks in Node 5)
Artifact write (competitor-clusters.json) — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
storeOs.downstreamConsumer: build-pattern-manifest (out of scope for Phase 2 — documented for future reference)
notes: Phase 16: Added runtime envelope. Expanded cluster prompt schema to request competitor_type_classification, price_tier, brand_style, product_breadth, trust_signals_used, strategic_summary. Also expanded competitor_examples items with optional classification fields.
